subject: [USECASE] Include basic_onboard in pythonsdk xtesting docker
commit_message:
[USECASE] Include basic_onboard in pythonsdk xtesting docker

The goal is not to run basic_onboard in CI/CD (already covered by basic_vm)
but to create a subset of basic_vm for the stability tests.
It is possible thanls to this test to run simultaneous onboarding oeprations
and compose realistic operation scenario.

Issue-ID: TEST-288

Signed-off-by: mrichomme <morgan.richomme@orange.com>
Change-Id: I70cca9688ef3654ba4bfd737879858e26e3b5506

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/6/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/6/ )
